acceptance_targets: [ch08_f005] PASS if no more than two negation-led contrast constructions remain across the cited spans and emphasis is otherwise carried by concrete sensory/action detail. FAIL if three or more 'Not.../not...not...' constructions still anchor emphasis in those same spans.

[ch08_f006] PASS if only one extended ledger-style block remains among the cited spans and at least one former list section is rewritten as continuous scene action with sensory detail or spoken exchange. FAIL if two or more list blocks stay in near-ledger form.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two negation-led contrast constructions remain across the cited spans and emphasis is otherwise carried by concrete sensory/action detail. FAIL if three or more 'Not.../not...not...' constructions still anchor emphasis in those same spans.
findings.problem: A recurring negation-driven emphasis formula ('Not X...', 'not X, not Y') appears well over twice, turning into a noticeable chapter tic and flattening rhythmic variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the negation-beat cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:350 by converting at least half into affirmative, concrete image/action sentences.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one extended ledger-style block remains among the cited spans and at least one former list section is rewritten as continuous scene action with sensory detail or spoken exchange. FAIL if two or more list blocks stay in near-ledger form.
findings.problem: Ledger/list construction repeats as a dominant prose engine (cash accounting, three-column napkin, document reordering), so the chapter's texture drifts toward bookkeeping cadence instead of scene pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one full accounting block for thematic force, but compress or dramatize the others at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:247, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:296 so at least one list turns into embodied action/dialogue.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
